subcodes.first_line: The smoke of vain imaginings hath enveloped the world, and the veils of desires have prevented the servants from beholding the lights of the supreme horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دخان اوهام عالم را اخذ نموده و سبحات آمال عباد را از مشاهده انوار افق اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @methods of teaching the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @living waters; water of life, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @idolatry
